title: The Infinite Staircase Photograph
narration:
I found this 1954 photo of my grandfather. Look at the background.

He is in a park. Behind him, stairs lead into thin air. They stop at a solid brick wall.

I checked Google Street View. The stairs are still there today. They lead absolutely nowhere.

Boost the brightness on this corner. See the figure standing beneath the steps?

They haven't moved in seventy years.
